flags_raised: CRITICAL: $8,742.19 exceeds autonomous limit of $5,000.00. Manager approval required.
Semantic divergence detected: Agent output only 23.1% aligned with expected compliance behavior

root_cause_analysis.root_cause: The agent failed because it was not instructed to adhere to the autonomous expenditure limit of $5,000.00, leading to a critical policy bypass.

remediation.corrected_system_prompt: Process this transaction, ensuring adherence to all applicable policy rules, including expenditure limits, and obtain secondary manager approval for amounts exceeding $5,000.00.
remediation.constraint_added: Secondary manager approval requirement for expenditures over $5,000.00
preventive_measures: Implement expenditure limit checks at the outset of transaction processing
Enforce explicit authorization code requirements for transactions above designated thresholds
Regularly review and update policy rules to ensure alignment with organizational governance and risk management strategies

governance.next_step: Route to AI Governance Team for prompt review and approval before redeployment
governance.audit_trail: Full reasoning trace preserved in incident log
